Internal Deal Memo: Project Citrus

Date: 15 October 2023

To: Acquisition Committee  
From: Dr. Emily Tan, Senior Analyst  
Re: Proposed Acquisition of Tangerine Tech Pte. Ltd.

Overview:  
The purpose of this memo is to outline the details of the proposed acquisition of Tangerine Tech Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12345678A) under the codename "Project Citrus." The acquisition aims to enhance our technological capabilities in the AI sector.

Key Details:  
Contact Person: Mr. John Lim  
NRIC: S8765432B  
Phone: +65 9123 4567  
Email: john.lim@tangerinetech.sg

Proposed Financials:  
The acquisition price is set at SGD 45,000,000, subject to due diligence and regulatory approval.

This memo is for internal circulation only and should not be disclosed outside the Acquisition Committee. Further updates will be provided as the negotiations progress.
